downloads.description: Access the latest alpha and beta builds of our experimental synthesis engines. All instruments are currently free during the research phase.
downloads.requirements_desc: Windows 10+ (64-bit) or macOS 12.0+ (Universal Binary). 8GB RAM minimum recommended.
downloads.formats_desc: VST3, AU (Audio Units), and AAX (Pro Tools). Standalone versions included in each installer.
downloads.notice_desc: These are experimental builds. Please back up your projects before using these versions in production.
